# Scenario (b): sentinels-old-only
#
# Pre-state: project has `.ndf-migrations/v3-to-v4-feature-scoped.complete`
# at the project root only. No `.ndf/cli/` directory exists.
#
# Verifies: the CLI's `migrationSentinelExists` helper finds sentinels
# at the OLD location.
#
# The fixture is exercised indirectly through `ndf update`'s gate
# logic; the verification script avoids the full network-bound update
# flow and instead uses a small built-in probe (see scripts/verify-dual-path.sh)
# to confirm sentinel existence checks work against the OLD layout.
#
# Expected: the OLD-path sentinel file is detected (no direct CLI
# command exposes this directly; the dual-path check is exercised by
# pendingMigrationsFromManifest at runtime). Fixture documents the
# layout the dual-path helper must handle correctly.
